shellCommands.command: npx next --version 2>/dev/null || echo "next not directly executable"

head -50 /home/user/workspace/node_modules/next/cache.d.ts 2>/dev/null || head -50 /home/user/workspace/node_modules/next/dist/build/templates/helpers.d.ts 2>/dev/null || node -e "const c = require('next/cache'); console.log(Object.keys(c))" 2>/dev/null || echo "checking next/cache module"; node -e "import('next/cache').then(c => console.log(Object.keys(c))).catch(e => console.log(e.message))" 2>/dev/null
